response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, Git) and excels in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud integration (AWS CDK), and testing (Vitest/Jest equivalents). His open-source contributions, architecture versatility, and proven track record in enterprise-scale automation and DevOps make him a standout candidate despite limited explicit Nest.js exposure.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent systems and developer tooling, including MCP frameworks
Strong DevOps and testing culture with open-source contributions and CI/CD infrastructure experience
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js in resume, though Node.js and architecture skills are strong
Limited evidence of direct PostgreSQL/MySQL usage despite required database experience
German language proficiency is only basic, which may impact collaboration in Berlin-based teams

key_factors.factor: Lack of explicit Nest.js or relational DB focus
